name: Trading Archive
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, or refine Trading Archive, especially the bundled `apps/trading-archive-bar` macOS menu bar app and its feed-ingest helper.
short_description: Trading article archive, reading queue, and menu bar app.
audience: Traders and market readers who want a dependable research reading queue
Builders maintaining RSS or Atom feed ingest and the native trading archive menu bar app
Mac users replacing ad hoc finance tabs with a local searchable archive
detail_lines: Turns public or user-authorized RSS and Atom feeds into a deduped reading queue, digest, source-health report, or local archive snapshot.
Keeps the native Trading Archive Bar app and helper flow grounded in cached, searchable local reading state.
Does not assume paywalled access, brokerage account access, trading permissions, or hidden market-data subscriptions.
